steps.title: Find the lowest value
steps.content: The question asks for the state of the plant with the lowest average power generated per year in 2019. The relevant table column is average power generation.

steps.title: Match value to state
steps.content: The Wisconsin plant has the lowest listed average power generation, 3,999 MWh per year. Michigan, Florida, and Indiana all have higher values in the table. The answer is A.
